title: Wild Liminal

# Wild Liminal

A lightweight modpack that focuses on Wilder Wild and liminal space

## Main attractions

+ [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild)
+ [The Corners](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-corners)
+ [Liminal Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/liminal-plus)
+ [DimensionalDoors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dimensionaldoors)
